summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FrameFlow Studio MVP - backend fully functional, frontend has critical React runtime errors

ui_bugs.issue: Critical React runtime error: 'Objects are not valid as a React child' causing error screens to display instead of normal UI
ui_bugs.error_details: throwOnInvalidObjectType error in React rendering, appears in multiple pages after navigation

integration_issues.issue: React errors prevent smooth navigation between pages in some cases

passed_tests: All backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
AI caption generation with Emergent LLM
Landing page with hero, features, Framey mascot
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical React runtime error: 'Objects are not valid as a React child'. This is preventing normal UI rendering and causing error screens. Check React component rendering logic, particularly around object serialization and JSX rendering.
